scope: Kitchen water-damage remediation following burst flexible hose under sink. Strip-out, drying, replacement of cabinetry, flooring, and gyprock to wet zone.

lineItems.description: Make safe and emergency water extraction (after-hours)
Strip-out of damaged kitchen cabinetry and disposal
Structural drying — 4 days, 3 dehumidifiers + air movers
Replace 9 m² engineered timber flooring (kitchen + adjoining hall)
Replace damaged gyprock to wet wall (4 m²) and repaint
Plumbing — replace flexible hose, isolation valves, pressure test

notes: Pricing assumes existing benchtop can be re-used after strip-out. Replacement benchtop quoted separately if delamination is found.
